summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LoRaWAN monitoring application. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. Demo data seeded successfully with 1 gateway, 5 devices, and proper SF-based heatmap visualization.
passed_tests: All 25 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Dashboard loads with correct stats and SF-colored map markers
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Gateways, Devices, Uplink Logs)
Gateway CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Device CRUD operations with SF badge display
CSV template download and import functionality
Test webhook button generates new uplink data
Dashboard filters (gateway, date range, clear filters)
Map displays devices colored by SF (green SF7-8, orange SF9-10, red SF11-12)
Responsive UI with proper data-testid attributes
Stats cards show correct counts (2 gateways, 6 devices, 8 uplinks after testing)
Uplink logs display with proper RSSI/SNR formatting
All dialogs and forms work correctly
